methodology.title: Data Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Understanding our data collection and processing methods

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Our platform aggregates price data from multiple oracle networks to provide comprehensive and reliable price information for cryptocurrency markets.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: We collect real-time price data from the following oracle networks:

sources.chainlink: Chainlink - Decentralized oracle network providing tamper-proof data
sources.pyth: Pyth Network - High-frequency financial data from first-party sources
sources.api3: API3 - First-party oracle solutions with data provider signatures
sources.tellor: Tellor - Decentralized oracle for any data

priceCalculation.title: Price Calculation Methodology
priceCalculation.description: Our price calculation follows these principles:

realTime.title: Real-time Updates
realTime.description: Prices are updated in real-time as new data becomes available from oracle networks

aggregation.title: Price Aggregation
aggregation.description: When multiple sources provide prices for the same asset, we calculate a weighted average based on source reliability and liquidity

outlierDetection.title: Outlier Detection
outlierDetection.description: We implement statistical methods to detect and filter out anomalous price data

timestamp.title: Timestamp Verification
timestamp.description: All price data includes timestamps to ensure data freshness and relevance

dataQuality.title: Data Quality Standards
dataQuality.description: We maintain high data quality through:

freshness.title: Data Freshness
freshness.description: We monitor and display the age of price data to ensure relevance

consistency.title: Cross-source Consistency
consistency.description: We compare prices across multiple sources to identify discrepancies

reliability.title: Source Reliability
reliability.description: Each oracle source is evaluated based on historical accuracy and uptime

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All data sources and calculation methods are openly documented

updateFrequency.title: Update Frequency
updateFrequency.description: Price data is updated at different intervals depending on the oracle network:

limitations.title: Limitations and Disclaimers
limitations.description: Please be aware of the following limitations:

items.latency: Price data may have slight latency due to network conditions
items.accuracy: While we strive for accuracy, prices may differ from other sources
items.availability: Data availability depends on oracle network uptime
items.notFinancialAdvice: Price data is for informational purposes only and should not be considered financial advice

methodologyUpdates.title: Methodology Updates
methodologyUpdates.description: We continuously improve our data methodology. Major updates are documented and communicated to users.
